items.summary: In `frontend/src/lib/binance-auth.ts` and `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts`, update every reference to the Binance position risk endpoint from `https://fapi.binance.com/fapi/v1/positionRisk` to `https://fapi.binance.com/fapi/v2/positionRisk`. Ensure the HMAC-SHA256 signing logic and all other request parameters remain unchanged.
